CustomField.description: Only if applicable (if the summary selected is installer/supplier) If installer fraud, error, non-compliance, to let us know detail - Enter the installer/supplier name if cannot find from the list provided
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Only if applicable (if the summary selected is installer/supplier) If installer fraud, error, non-compliance, to let us know detail - Enter the installer/supplier name if cannot find from the list provided
CustomField.label: Installer / Supplier Name
